heading: Annual study on boil water advisories
label: 300j–18a Annual study on boil water advisories
notes: CodificationSection enacted as part of the Drinking Water and Wastewater Infrastructure Act of 2021 and also as part of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, and not as part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.

Definition of Administrator, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–58, div. E, § 50002135 Stat. 1135Nov. 15, 2021“In this division [see Short Title of 2021 Amendment note set out under , Navigation and Navigable Waters], the term ‘Administrator’ means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.”section 1251 of Title 33

E, § 50002135 Stat. 1135Nov. 15, 2021“In this division [see Short Title of 2021 Amendment note set out under , Navigation and Navigable Waters], the term ‘Administrator’ means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.”section 1251 of Title 33

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter, the Administrator shall conduct a study on the prevalence of boil water advisories issued in the United States.November 15, 2021

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Administrator shall submit to Congress a report describing the results of the most recent study conducted under subsection (a) as part of the annual budget request transmitted to Congress under .section 1105(a) of title 31

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: 2 Requirement
children.text: In the annual report required under paragraph (1), the Administrator shall include a description of the reasons for which boil water advisories were issued during the year covered by the report.
